summary.shape_sentence: Opening pop failed into a long morning selloff, then a 13:00 low produced a full afternoon V-reversal back near the open/upper session.

goat.note: Afternoon V-reversal from the 28,745 low back to the upper session near 29,174.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots worked after the opening spike and through late-morning lower highs while price stayed below VWAP/fast EMAs.

green_circles.behavior: Best bullish pivots appeared after the 13:00 low, with pullbacks holding as higher lows into the close.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply near 29,215–29,255 rejected the opening push; lower supply around 29,000–29,030 was later reclaimed.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 28,760–28,790 held the session low; later zones around 28,900–28,930 and 29,045–29,075 supported continuation.

time_markers.10am_blue: Post-opening rejection; price was losing control below the spike high around 29,170–29,220.
time_markers.12pm_red: Bearish trend state near 28,860, with bounces failing below declining averages.
time_markers.2pm_green: Recovery underway from the 13:00 low, forming higher lows near 28,900.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bullish close near 29,174 after sustained afternoon buying, closer to HOD than LOD.

tags.banks_respected: 13:00 demand held and powered the reversal
tags.banks_broken: lower supply near 29,000 was reclaimed during the afternoon drive

takeaway: Failed opening pop into a deep morning liquidation, followed by a clean 13:00 demand hold and full afternoon V-reversal. Reference as a bullish recovery day where early shorts were rewarded, but holding below demand failed and late buyers controlled the close.
